inline_comments.message: CPS-290 is a different bug that has already been fixed and merged.

I think this bug that is not clearly understood yet deserves its own Jira to understand and keep track of it, especially now that we also cherry picking for Honolulu.

We are still able to mark this one as Caused By CPS-190 in Jira is needed.

Hi Bruno I think this was a missed impact for CPS-290.
What is not understood is how mvn clean install could pas without this test using the correct constructor. 
I still need to investigate that. 
so this fix should definitely be under the same Jira: CPS-290

In fact, to review, I was also looking for a description of the issue we are fixing here.

Finally, I was able to figure out:

    groovy.lang.GroovyRuntimeException: Could not find matching constructor for: org.onap.cps.spi.exceptions.AlreadyDefinedException(String, String)

        at org.onap.cps.rest.controller.DataRestControllerSpec.Get data node error scenario: #scenario.(DataRestControllerSpec.groovy:168)
